appDescription.message: Save links to your LinkDigest WordPress plugin

msgConfigureFirst.message: ⚙️ Please configure your API settings first.

descWpAddress.message: Your WordPress site URL. Used to auto-fill the endpoint below.

descApiEndpoint.message: The API endpoint URL from your WordPress LinkDigest settings page.

descApiKey.message: The API key generated in your WordPress LinkDigest settings.

infoBoxTitle.message: How to get your API credentials:

infoStep1.message: Go to your WordPress admin panel

infoStep3.message: Generate an API Key if you haven't already

infoStep4.message: Copy the API Endpoint and API Key

infoStep5.message: Paste them into the fields above

msgSelectCategory.message: Please select at least one category before saving.

msgSaveFailed.message: Failed to save link. Please check your settings.

notifAlreadySavedBody.message: This URL has already been saved.

msgConnectionFailed.message: Failed to connect to WordPress. Please check your credentials.

msgSettingsFailed.message: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

msgNoWp.message: ✗ No WordPress installation found at this URL

msgKeyFilled.message: ✓ Logged in — API key filled automatically
